pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6.x APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x due to underlying Spring Framework version mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x starter-test no longer includes JUnit Vintage by default, making the exclusion redundant and potentially causing configuration conflicts if the parent POM structure changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version declaration for maven-surefire-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x parent POM manages the version of maven-surefire-plugin; explicit versions can conflict with managed dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version declaration for maven-failsafe-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x parent POM manages the version of maven-failsafe-plugin; explicit versions can conflict with managed dependencies.
